verify.bad_error_contains: valid value for the ActionCode field

base_read.sql: SELECT a.assignment_number AS ASG_NUM, MAX(a.assignment_id) AS ASG_ID, MAX(TO_CHAR(a.normal_hours)) AS NHOURS, MAX(TO_CHAR(a.effective_start_date,'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS ESD FROM per_all_assignments_m a WHERE a.assignment_number IN ('E2','E3','E4') AND a.effective_latest_change='Y' AND a.effective_start_date = DATE '${BEN_DATE_DASH}' AND a.normal_hours = 37.5 GROUP BY a.assignment_number
